response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and identified three distinct segments of music. 2. Identified '桃源恋歌' (GARNiDELiA) for the first segment (00:00-00:56) and successfully found its lyrics. 3. Identified 'ねねちのギラギラファンミーティング' for the second segment (00:56-03:02) but could not find the full lyrics. 4. Identified 'COOLISH WALK' (Working!! cast) for the final segment (03:02-04:59) but could not find the full lyrics. 5. Constructed the JSON response with identified metadata.
response.global_summary: A video from Momosuzu Nene's birthday live 2026, featuring a medley of her original songs and a cover performance.

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene performs the song '桃源恋歌'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
見つめられたら それだけで
甘い花が 香りだす
「誰にも話しちゃいけないよ」
夢なら醒めないで 桃源郷
一つ噛じれば 密の味
やめないで 戻れなくても
ヒラヒラリ 舞って落ちゆく
染められて 望みのままに
口づけくらいじゃ 足りない ウォーアイニー
夜が終わるまで 踊りましょう
指と指を 絡ませて
桃の雫 飲み干せば
「このまま離れたくない」
どうか消えないで 桃源郷
もうひとつかじれば 罪の味
怖くない あなたとならば
ハラハラリ 咲いて散りゆく
揺らされて この恋ゴコロ
欲しいのは ひとつ あなたのウォーアイニー
この身果てるまで 唄いましょう
ヒラハラリ 舞って落ちゆく
染められて 望みのままに
口づけくらいじゃ 足りない ウォーアイニー
夜が終わるまで 踊りましょう
ハラハラリ 咲いて散りゆく
揺らされて この恋ゴコロ
欲しいのは ひとつ あなたのウォーアイニー
この身果てるまで 唄いましょう
永遠に 捧げましょう 我愛イ尓
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just being looked at by you,
Sweet flowers start to fragrance,
'You must not tell anyone about this.'
If this is a dream, do not wake, Shangri-La,
If you take one bite, it's the taste of honey,
Don't stop, even if I can't return,
Fluttering, dancing down,
Dyed in the way I desire,
Just a kiss is not enough, I love you,
Let's dance until the night ends,
Intertwining fingers,
If I drink up the peach drops,
'I don't want to leave this state,'
Please don't disappear, Shangri-La,
If you take another bite, it's the taste of sin,
I'm not afraid, if I'm with you,
Fluttering, blooming then scattering,
Swayed, this love in my heart,
All I want is one thing, your 'I love you',
I'll sing until this body dies,
Fluttering, dancing down,
Dyed in the way I desire,
Just a kiss is not enough, I love you,
Let's dance until the night ends,
Fluttering, blooming then scattering,
Swayed, this love in my heart,
All I want is one thing, your 'I love you',
I'll sing until this body dies,
I will offer it eternally, I love you

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene performs her song 'ねねちのギラギラファンミーティング' and talks to the audience.
scenes.song_title: ねねちのギラギラファンミーティング

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, and Himemori Luna perform 'COOLISH WALK'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Shirogane Noel, Himemori Luna
